title: andromeda glandulosa var. ovalifolia
intro: Andromeda glandulosa var. ovalifolia, commonly known as the Mountain Pieris, is a flowering plant species found in the mountainous regions of East Asia. It is a type of evergreen shrub that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The health benefits of Andromeda glandulosa var. ovalifolia include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health, while also exhibiting antimicrobial and antioxidant properties. The bioactive constituents of this plant include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and triterpenoids, which contribute to its therapeutic actions of anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects.
